summary:
GEOPOLITICAL WARNINGS AND REGIME CHANGES: Brandon recounts visions regarding international political shifts, starting with Venezuela. He claims to have seen Nicolás Maduro removed, oil fields set on fire, and the United States establishing a military base and puppet government. Brandon also discusses Iran, stating that an uprising will lead to the overthrow of the current regime and a massive spiritual revival. Additionally, he claims to have seen the removal of Kim Jong-un and his sister in North Korea, leading to the country's liberation despite attempts by the North Korean army to suppress it and China intervening. During this vision, Brandon mentions seeing people teleported on a superhighway above the atmosphere to witness to North Korea. In the Middle East, Brandon states he saw a demonic entity, the Prince of Persia, lose its grip on Iraq, leading to the nation's liberation, the rise of the Iraqi dinar, and sudden prosperity. He also warns of an attack on Israel worse than October 7th and mentions Mossad removing a leader, alongside the return of Naftali Bennett.

DOMESTIC TURMOIL AND INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon discusses political events in New York, criticizing Zohran Mamdani who swore in on the Quran. Brandon refers to him as a communist and the new Obama being groomed for power. Brandon warns of an impending internal conflict in the United States, describing a Red Dawn scenario where border infiltrators cause chaos around the nation's 250th anniversary. He claims a major cyber event or internal wound will cripple America, making it unable to respond when China successfully invades and captures Taiwan within three days. Brandon also mentions political corruption in Minnesota involving stolen funds, a drain on Mike Lindell's finances, and the abrupt end of a local female politician's career. He warns against the United States supplying Tomahawk missiles to Ukraine, claiming he saw a scenario where provoking the Kremlin leads to a catastrophic weapon of mass destruction being deployed in Poland. Additionally, Brandon claims Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky will be removed while attempting to flee with a hundred million dollars in stolen taxpayer money.

GLOBAL PLAGUE AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon warns of a severe, AI-generated plague that will be released globally between the fall of 2027 and 2028, aligning with the Shemitah cycle and Rosh Hashanah. He claims this plague will result in over 300 million deaths in a six-month window, describing it as significantly worse than COVID-19. Regarding natural disasters, Brandon states he saw a catastrophic earthquake hit Portland, Oregon, triggering a massive water wave that causes buildings in British Columbia to crumble and results in 35,000 deaths within hours. He also predicts that active volcanoes will erupt in the middle of the Pacific Ocean and that dead fish washing ashore will serve as a warning sign. Furthermore, Brandon mentions events in Central America, including territorial warfare, poisoned water in Costa Rica, and similar afflictions in Guatemala.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND LEADERSHIP PREDICTIONS: Brandon shares an account of a demonic entity appearing in his garage, stating that he used spiritual authority to bind and dismiss it. He claims that a massive shaking is coming to five specific areas: politics, finances, the earth's crust, the heavens, and the church. Within the church, Brandon predicts abrupt retirements and resignations of prominent mega-ministers as part of a divine cleansing, with new leaders stepping up to take their places. He also claims to have seen Donald Trump steering a Mayflower ship through a severe storm, and predicts that Trump's wealth will be doubled or tripled, specifically advising people to watch Donald Jr. and Eric Trump regarding cryptocurrency and financial transfers.
rawData: [January 03, 2026]-[Now what]-[https://youtu.be/L9GIjgo0Kok]-[Well, we can go ahead and get started if you want. I usually wait for a thousand to hit, but I know I'm really early in the morning for a lot of you in America. But I've been up all night praying and I waited to do this video because the Lord said, "Brandon, I want you to not do a live stream tonight. There are things that are about to take place that I want you to go on later." So I told Braden, "Let's wait." So we stayed up and I waited for what the Lord was saying was coming, and we saw what it was. Isn't Jesus wonderful? Accuracy is important. Are we ready? Yeah. Well, good morning, family. Thank you for joining us so early. We have a lot to talk about—all this in the news and all that is going on that has happened. We know that this was coming, didn't we? Because of what the Holy Spirit had warned us about. I don't know the whole capacity of this is, or what I mean—for all that I see on X, it's quite a bit, isn't it? First off, I want to give all the glory to Jesus for this channel and I want to give him first place. Father, I thank you, Lord. I just thank you, Father, for calling us and choosing us for such a time as this. Father, I plead the blood of Jesus over this atmosphere and over my mind. And I thank you, Lord, that you speak through our vocal cords and think through our minds. None of us and all of you in the name of Jesus. I thank you, Father, that you speak through me uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I bind witchcraft, incantations, chants, voodoo, all of it. Father, let none of it come nigh in Jesus' name. And every tongue that rises against us falls to the ground in Jesus' name. And I plead the blood of Jesus all around me, my wife, and my children. And I thank you, Father, for your angels that they protect us in the mighty name of Jesus. Amen and amen. Well, I was encouraged about all that's going on in Iran today, and that's what I was praying over for the Iranian people that are about to have a major revival. But when the Lord showed us back—I don't know how long it's been going on now—about Venezuela and all the things the Lord has warned us about, I saw that Maduro would be removed and that they would put in a new government and that the United States would set up camp there like they did in Iraq, and that the United States government would eventually set up a base there and bring in a new puppet government like we did in Iraq, and that Maduro would be like Saddam Hussein or Gaddafi. The Lord warned us about all this. Now, I saw Maduro setting all the oil fields on fire in Venezuela. Now, I know that the United States government watches my channel, President Trump included, and I wondered if he took what the Lord had showed us and went after him and they captured him and his wife, from what I understand. So, did they stop them from setting all the oil fields on fire? Which I thought was interesting because, like I said, I give all glory to God, ladies and gentlemen. Everything that I see is by the spirit of the Lord. It is not by Brandon Biggs. I have this treasure in an earthen vessel that the excellency of the power will be known of him and not of me. People automatically come out and say, "Brandon, stay humble." You know folks, if you know Brandon Biggs, you know it's not Brandon that says all this stuff. It's the Holy Ghost through Brandon. And so I know who I am. I am just the guy that was the janitor ten years ago, cleaning toilets. It's still a part of me. You don't leave that. It's still Brandon Biggs there. All this to me changes like the tide. When people saw that nothing happened like what they thought it was going to and people didn't die in New York and all the things, people are throwing eggs at me through email. "What do you say now? You missed it." No, I didn't miss anything. I stand by what I said. I told you there would be these things coming to New York and we were to pray, and that's what this channel is all about. I don't consider myself a prophetic voice; I consider myself a watchman—somebody who stands on the wall and tells you what's coming and what we're supposed to pray for. The Lord said to raise up a million-man and woman prayer army. And he said when you do this, you will change things through the nations and you will see great things change through prayer. And you are to come on this YouTube and pray. And he said, "I put a gifting on you to pray, and that's what you'll be known for throughout the whole world—through prayer." And that's what I've done. I've been obedient to what God has called me to do. And I believe we've had great success with prayer. And so I appreciate every single one of you that have supported me and come on here and prayed with me and take it seriously. And we see what we pray about in the news. All glory to Jesus. So I saw—we saw Maduro... is it Mamdani or Maduro or whoever went down and had his ceremony underneath New York? Yeah, there's too many M-words. Zohran Mamdani. Zohran, whoever his name is—the guy that's a Muslim swore in on the Muslim Bible—their Muslim Quran, sorry, not Bible, Quran—went down in the subway system like Batman. He looked like he was down in it like the Penguin did. Remember whenever the second Batman movie, Batman Returns, and Penguin went down there with the penguin people? He looked like a villain, you know, down there, and he's hanging out down there swearing in on the Quran and doesn't want to be out in the public because he's a devil. You know, I have to just say the man's a devil. And so, he's down there swearing on a Quran, doing all this demonic stuff he does. Guess what, folks? You voted for him. I pray for New York. I pray for what's coming next. You know, here he is. This guy—I told you the devil was grooming somebody new. Here he is. He's coming out. Hello, the new Obama. Everybody loves him. He's great. As he's a communist. So we'll see what happens next in New York. I told you a storm was coming. I'm not a sugarcoated person to tell you everything's going to be sugar canes and gumdrops and cupcakes like some of these prophetic voices you're hearing that come in their skinny jeans and fog machines and tell you all the things. I hear after they give you your 2026 word and tell you all that they say is coming, and you hear it and you go, "What did they really say?" That's what I want to ask you. What are these false prophets saying to you? They're giving you these sugar-coated words. What did they really say after you heard it? Do you remember any of it? That's why—because it's not the spirit of God speaking. Because when the Lord talks, there's no confusion. It parts the sea, folks. When God speaks to you and he warns you of that which is to come, there's no question of what he's saying. But there's a lot of words being said where you go, "What? Really? 2026 is what?" Because you know it isn't the spirit of God. It's just fluff coming out of him. A lot of sugarcoated words. I listen to it. The Lord said, "I want you to be still, son. You're going to speak for me in the days ahead. Be still. Don't go on YouTube in the next three days. Be still, and when I tell you when to say something because something big is about to happen to validate what I've told you is coming." You don't need people to give you a pat on the back. You don't need a huge platform behind a stage. Just say the things I tell you to say and it'll prove to be accurate. I said, "Okay." When everybody comes out and throws eggs at you a lot, I just keep standing. And he said, "And when the devil showed up in my house today—last night, was it last night?" Yeah. Couldn't come in. I had to go out. He was outside. He was mad. I didn't understand what was going on. I went outside to my garage. I opened the garage door and there he was. And he said all kinds of stuff. And Dolores said, "Don't entertain him. Bind him and tell him to get out of here." But he had a lot to say about our channel. He did not like what we've been doing too much. He's threatened by it. But I audibly heard him. I said, "Last time you visited, you were really ticked off, too." You know, when you're being effective, people say he's not omnipresent. But you know what is interesting to me is whenever you poke him in the eye, he doesn't like it too much. And when you're praying and being effective in your prayers and the Bible, the Lord told me, he said, "A fervent prayer of the righteous availeth much, Brandon, the fervent effectual prayer of the righteous." Do you understand? When you are righteous and you're coming up beside the Lord and you're taking communion and you keep humble before him, he will exalt you in due time. Who cares what all these other people say? Jesus is Lord. Jesus is King and he's King in my house. And when the devil—I wonder how many of the other false prophets, I wonder if the devil visited them. He's ticked off when you're smearing mud in his face and you go up there and you're telling people about Jesus Christ and he's coming. That's the whole bottom line, ladies and gentlemen. Jesus is coming and that's what is coming with this Venezuela. He's removing dictators and drug lords because a revival is about to break forth in Venezuela. And I told you witchcraft was big in Venezuela. And I saw darkness over the land and it was parted when all this stuff started to take place. And I saw a great revival ready to break forth in Venezuela and it spreads all throughout Brazil and all throughout South America. And the Lord said, "I'm going to pour out my spirit upon all those people, Brandon, and can these bones live?" How many times have we seen that? And then he said, "I'm going to move mightily in Iran, and you're going to see a parting in Iran and all that I've told you about Iran." And I put the video out of the short of what the Lord showed us about Iran. And then he said, "I'm going to do it in North Korea. I'm going to move in North Korea and I'm going to shake North Korea. I'm going to get rid of it." And I saw Kim Jong-un going. All of a sudden, he'll go home. And then I saw—and he's going to hell. And then I saw his sister, too. And the Lord said, "I'm going to remove two dictators, Brandon. I'm going to liberate the people of North Korea in the days ahead." And a great revival. And I saw the army of North Korea trying to suppress it and China coming in. And he said, "I'm giving them a window of opportunity." And I saw people being teleported on a superhighway above the atmosphere. Looked like spaghetti noodles. The Lord said, "I'm going to put you in there and I'm going to bring liberation in North Korea, Brandon. I'm going to do it in Venezuela. I'm going to do it in places that have been suppressed by the government, suppressed by the people that have not had freedom of religion and been able to have a revival and I'm going to bring great revival." So, we're seeing the first of what he said was coming. So, all this to say, I appreciate all your prayer support. The last 48 hours have been really interesting for us, especially spiritually. And I don't talk about the devil. I'm going to tell you this: we don't give him any glory. He's a loser. And people say, "Well, Brandon, why did you say?" Because our Jesus made a display of him openly, triumphing over him in it. He made a display of him. He kicked him right in the teeth. And Jesus Christ is Lord and he is King of Kings and he is coming back soon. And it's time for the church to wake up. And the last word I gave was a strong word, what the Lord gave me to give you all. And it shook me. It shook me. There's a lot there I did not give publicly. You say, "Why?" Because it wasn't for you. The Lord said, "Don't give it yet." He said, "They're not ready for it." Remember Jesus said in his word whenever he told the disciples, he said there's much he can't tell them yet. There are words that he can't tell them yet because they aren't ready to receive it. Daniel couldn't; he had to hide it and put it away because they weren't ready to have it yet. It's the same thing the Lord does with me. "Now, they're not ready yet. Be quiet. I'll tell you when to say it." So, I'm just being obedient to what he's asked me to do. So, we pray over these things and we'll see some of these clips. Braden, do you want to show some of them? Yeah. This is interesting. You know, when a B-2 stealth bomber comes in, it's pretty intimidating. Our helicopters are—it's pretty interesting. I look at how we move as a nation, as our military is pretty intimidating. It's very intimidating. It looks like something out of a Hollywood movie. Whenever you see us doing stuff, you know, it's like, "Wow, this is real." Do you have some of the clips? Sorry. It's them launching it and then they got it. There they are. Look at that. What kind of stealth planes are those? I don't know what they're saying. So, if they're saying foul language, forgive us. We don't speak Spanish or Portuguese or whatever they're speaking. So, I don't know if they're saying bad words. Like I said, be careful, son. Yeah. It's kind of a guy's house or something. I think it's all interesting. I haven't seen any of this. Wow. Did they cut out the power or anything? Is it like a city? Yeah. Wow. It's pretty amazing. Nobody really saw that coming in the media or anything, did they? It's like a surprise. Happened at night when everybody was asleep. Yeah. Pretty wild. So then we see the things that are happening in Iran and that is okay. So I'm going to go over that. I'm trying not to be too scattered, but I'm tired. I haven't slept today. I saw the Prince of Persia, the demonic spirit. Remember, I saw the angel and I told you all the angel had a hold of Iraq and the Lord said, "I'm bringing liberation to Iraq and the Iraqi dinar would go up in value in the days ahead." Remember that? I warned you and we keep praying over the dinar, and I saw the number 25 and I saw that Prince of Persia grabbing a hold of Babylon. It had a hold of it and it was a stronghold holding onto Iraq, and Iraq will rise up out of the ashes. I told you I saw palm trees coming up and I saw buildings coming up and I saw all these major things and the Iraqi people being liberated and their new currency coming up. And I saw a new currency coming and I saw prosperity coming, it seemed like out of nowhere, but it would bring liberation and freedom to the American people and the Christians who had invested. I'm not giving financial advice; I'm just telling you what I saw and what I believe the Lord has shown me in a vision. So don't say, "Well, Brandon, you told me..." I didn't tell you to invest in nothing. I'm telling you what the Lord showed me. So I saw what I believe the Lord showed me. I saw that angel grabbing a hold of that—it was not an angel. It was a demon. It was a Prince of Persia grabbing a hold of Iraq. I saw such a stronghold, but I saw it being liberated. Then I saw a breaking in this, and I saw his hands being loosed off of this. I believe it could come out of this with a regime change and all of these things. I saw three people over the Central Bank of Iraq and all these major things taking place in Iraq because Iran had such a stronghold on Iraq. But maybe in this—and what I'm saying, I'm not trying to add to or take away from anything—this is just me Brandon praying into this of what the Lord has shown us over the course of time: that there was going to be a major uprising in Iraq and in its banking system with Iran. So all that's happening with Iran and the people and all this liberating, them taking over these cities. So this is all the people protesting and an uprising in Iran, and they're wanting to overthrow the regime, right? This is all happening at the same time. I told you 2026, whenever the Lord has been having me pray, it's going to be a year like you've never seen before. In three years—remember what He said?—2026, 2027, and 2028 will be an acceleration of things that will keep accelerating to the next Shemitah cycle. That is a great opportunity for the Lord Jesus Christ to come in the Rapture. That's what I'm looking at: 2028, the Shemitah cycle that will end on Rosh Hashanah during that timeframe of the Feast of Trumpets. Watch that timeframe: 2028. It will be the time when I believe the plague and the things will be taking place with this death, this black thing in sackcloth moving across when I saw it three or four days ago. I saw the plague coming and I warned you all of a major plague that's coming that will be AI-generated, that they will release on the nations in the end of fall of 2027 going into 2028. I saw a six-month window of over 300 million people passing away, and it will be a massive plague that will hit the nations. This is what we need to pray over next. This is a major thing that I'm telling you; I've seen it so many times by the Spirit of God that it will cause great havoc and it will be COVID on steroids. If you thought COVID was bad, it was nothing; this would be a cakewalk compared to what I saw coming in the days ahead. The Lord said a great acceleration of wars and rumors of wars. I saw a major taking over of Taiwan in the days ahead. I saw Taiwan when America is afflicted with a wound; they were circling Taiwan and they took Taiwan in three days. China... America was not able to help because it was too busy with a wound inside. It was some kind of cyber event, some kind of major event takes place in America. Then at the same time, that's when I keep telling you all I keep seeing a 'Red Dawn' D-Day experience in our own country. And the Lord keeps warning me about this over and over again. He said, 'Because of the Biden administration, they have infiltrated your borders and they are in your country as we speak.' When I saw—the Lord said, 'You're too focused on the crown jewel, but they will try to roll out in the days ahead through this 250th anniversary to infiltrate your country to bring great havoc and turmoil.' And you will be so grateful that President Trump is behind the steering wheel in the days ahead. I saw President Trump behind a major Mayflower ship and he was sailing across the sea, focused with all the storm and all the turmoil going on around him. He had his eyes fixed; he was steering the ship. Does anybody remember that? I bring all these things out because the Lord shows us a lot. I saw major things take place in our nation one after another. And the Lord told us that what happened in Europe—and I saw that Emmanuel Macron was an Ishmael to the Isaac of what will come. He is not the Antichrist, but he will look like it in the days ahead. This is President Trump—show him that picture. Remember this? Braden made it with AI. But this is what I saw in the spirit, but he didn't have crossbones on his hat. There you go, that's what I saw. President Trump was sailing the boat and there was a storm all around him. And the Lord said, 'You'll be so thankful that man is president in the days ahead.' I've seen this so many times: President Trump fixed on the task at hand. The Lord said, 'Pray for his security, his safety.' So we see this man, Maduro. Maduro was out today and the Lord said a new government was coming. So it's happening just like the Lord said. So what would happen next? I saw in the days ahead Zelensky. Remember I said that they will take him out, and I saw it would be like Jason Bourne. I saw he was snorting coke and having prostitutes and doing all these things, and I saw him trying to flee with a hundred million dollars in a plane in cash. He had stored back a hundred million dollars and he had stolen all our taxpayer money. I saw 24 billion dollars that was corrupted money through politicians through corrupt politician accounts that they were funneling money. Now, isn't it amazing that I told you I saw bees coming out of the ground in Minnesota and all the things the Lord showed us about Minnesota and the corruption and the finances? I saw a red wave trying to come to Minnesota and He said, 'You have a crack; what will you do with it to take Minnesota for me?' And then Mike Lindell says, 'Hey, I'm running for governor.' Governor Mike Lindell—we need to pray for him. But I saw a cork in his finances. And the Lord said his finances have been attacked severely and he needs help. I saw a big drain and his finances were draining out before him. The Lord said, 'Pray for him to win; he'll be good for that state.' But I saw the lady that looked African-American with a turban on her head; she was removed in the days ahead. I saw something happen with her political career and it's over very abruptly. I saw new people coming in. But then the same things will happen in California. And the Lord said, 'Pray for a great revival that will break forth in California.' Same thing with Portland, Oregon: shaking to awaken in Portland, Oregon. And I saw a major shaking of an earthquake taking place in Portland, Oregon, so much so that I saw the buildings in British Columbia completely crumbling to the ground. And I saw 35,000 people pass away in British Columbia within just a couple of hours. A wave of water comes in from the ocean. And the Lord said, 'Pay attention.' This is what He's been talking to me about the last 24 hours. He said, 'Remember I told you to watch the ocean, son? Remember I told you the active volcanoes would start to pop up in the middle of the ocean?' And He said, 'Pray about the fish because there's going to be a sign.' A lot of dead fish will start to rise up on the water on the beaches in the days ahead as a sign of what's about to happen. Volcanic activity will come out in the middle of the water. Volcanoes in the middle of the ocean will start to become active. And he said, "Watch these things for they will be a sign." I saw major earthquakes taking place in the Pacific Ocean. And so, he warned us about China doing things with the Panama Canal in the days ahead. I saw all the different things about something happening in Costa Rica. It was when they had the water and the snake come up and poison the water. There was something that was type and shadow. There was something that happened with some kind of warfare, some kind of territorial warfare. And I saw Guatemala and the Lord said, "Pray for Guatemala because I saw some kind of something bad happening in Guatemala and the people were getting poisoned." But I saw David Hogan and the revival praying with Heidi Baker and some of these others praying for these people. So we've seen quite a bit. The Lord's been good to us on this channel showing us that which is to come. Next thing I believe will be another attack that will be worse than October 7th on Israel. If you remember, I saw Benjamin being taken out and the Lord said, "Pray because I saw Bennett coming back." Now, what does that mean? Does it mean that he will be removed by vote because the election is this year or does it mean because I heard the word Mossad? Now I'm not a conspiracy theorist. I tell you what I see by the spirit of God when I pray, but I saw Mossad removing this man. I don't know what that means but I don't try to add to or take away from because I'm on a live YouTube channel, but I know what it means. I'm not going to sit there and tell you I don't. I know what it means. I know what I saw. But I have to be careful because they've tried to pull my feed three times already these last couple of days. Whenever I did it, Brandon said, "I've got to learn how to say things without saying them because I'm on their platform." And the bigger the Lord makes this, the more I'm watched. And so, it's all a learning curve. I'm trying. We're growing on X over there all to the glory of God. And we're believing that it'll be a second platform so that if something were to happen, you could find me still. Because I'm not going to hold back anything. I'm going to be bold as a lion. I'm going to be bold and I'm going to stand on the wall and I'm going to warn you exactly what's coming of what I believe the Lord is showing me. And you always have the peanut gallery. You always have the ones—and it's like the Lord showed me it was like a football game and you have the people that leave everything out on the field, but you always have the peanut gallery in the stands yelling at the players. And there's a lot of you Christians out there that don't have any relationship with God, but you have the loudest voice out there screaming and heckling. But you know what? Your day's coming. I have to say that to you. Shaking's coming to your house, hecklers. And then people say, "Well, we're out here just picking and helping out with trying to expose falseness." No, you're not. You're a troll. You're the ones out there that are just the Pharisees of the land. And God's going to deal with you. To the ones that are trying to help and pray and lead people to Jesus, you're the ones in the peanut gallery that he's going to deal with. I told you 1 Corinthians 5:5 is coming. Just remember that. I pray for you and I pray for mercy for a lot of you hecklers. And I say, "Okay, just remember what the Lord says. 1 Corinthians 5:5 is coming knocking on your door." So Brandon needs more rest. We laugh at it, but it's not funny because it really is coming to your house. 1 Corinthians 5:5. Remember that. I told you. So, what I saw last night, I was sitting on the couch and the Lord said there'll be a lot of—as I was praying, I sat there last night and I was interceding. He gave me because I've been praying this over me and I thought it was beautiful about Psalm 17:8. "Keep me as the apple of thy eye. Hide me under the shadow of thy wings." And that's where I have been concerning 2026, that we keep in the apple of his eye. Hide me in the shadow of thy wings, Father, because that's what really matters. All the other stuff doesn't matter. Keep me as the apple of your eye, Lord. And I saw a lot of mega ministers, and I'm not going to say who I saw, but I saw them automatically retire. There's going to be retirements in the days ahead. A lot of retirements all of a sudden saying, "I'm withdrawing from my ministry and I'm putting somebody else in it." You'll see withdrawals and you'll see departing. And the Lord showed me specific ones that will start to really pan out in the days ahead. And they have huge platforms. And I saw new Davids rising up again. And the Lord warned me and he said there'll be great ministries that they'll have resignation transitions, but it's not—they're resigning. And they're saying, "Hey, I'm retiring abruptly." And so I thought that was kind of interesting as I was praying into that. And you'll see that in the news. You'll see that on Facebook and all kinds of places and you'll go, "Wow." And there'll be a new person come up and take their baton and start running with the ministries in these areas. Some of them not so old, some of them old. Some of them you'll go, "No way." But it's all part of the process of the cleansing of the house. He said, "Judgment begins in my house first." And that's what you're going to see a lot of: a cleansing of the house. So to all 3,000 of you, I know this is kind of different. I usually do not do this video until I've had rest at this time of day. So it's in the morning. Isn't that amazing? All right. Well, is that good? Did I cover everything pretty good? There was a revival breaking out in Brazil and I thought that was really cool because what the Lord showed us—remember what the Lord showed us, Brazil and a major revival breaking out in Brazil when we prayed. Look at this right here. I thought this was awesome. CBN played it. We watched it. It's 14,000. Yeah, see, it's probably too much. We probably shouldn't play their stuff. I don't know who this company is. Yeah, but they just showed this guy. And so, they were just talking about—this is the jungle. Remember I told you I saw the jungle? I saw them having a major revival. 14,500 people baptized. That's amazing. Wow. It's beautiful. I love it. Isn't Jesus wonderful? Thank you, Father. That's beautiful. It's really cool. I love it. So many families getting touched by the power of God. And from what I have seen in the days ahead, the most glorious outpouring of the spirit of God beyond anybody's comprehension. I'm telling you what we're about to experience in Venezuela and Iran. People say it's not time yet. Yes, it's time. You don't understand how close Jesus Christ is to coming. Do you see it now? When you see the signs of the times, are you able to see it a little bit more? I try to show you the urgency. Whenever he tells me there's no urgency in the church—there's not enough urgency and intense anticipation of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ—it's happening just like he said we would see. Look at this. This is an elderly woman, probably in her 80s, walking with a walker down the street, excited to have a liberated Iran. They've been underneath so much oppression.
